concepts.name: TokenEstimatorOptions
concepts.what: Configuration options for the token estimator.

properties.name: charsPerToken
properties.description: Characters per token ratio.

properties.name: maxDepth
properties.description: Maximum depth to traverse for circular reference detection.

properties.name: maxStringLength
properties.description: Maximum string length to process for Unicode grapheme counting.

concepts.name: ContextLedgerEntry
concepts.what: A single entry in the context ledger recording one state mutation.

properties.name: entryId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this ledger entry.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the mutation occurred.

properties.name: operation
properties.description: Operation that produced this context change.

properties.name: contextDelta
properties.description: Key-value delta describing the context fields that changed.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: Request identifier that triggered this entry, for tracing.

concepts.name: BudgetEnforcementOptions
concepts.what: Options controlling token-budget enforcement behaviour.

concepts.name: BudgetEnforcementResult
concepts.what: Outcome of running budget enforcement on a LAFS envelope.

properties.name: envelope
properties.description: The envelope after budget enforcement (possibly truncated).

properties.name: withinBudget
properties.description: `true` if the estimated token count is within the allowed budget.

properties.name: estimatedTokens
properties.description: Estimated token count of the final envelope.

properties.name: budget
properties.description: Maximum allowed token count that was enforced.

properties.name: truncated
properties.description: Whether the envelope's result was truncated to fit the budget.

concepts.name: EnvelopeValidationResult
concepts.what: Result of validating a value against the LAFS envelope JSON Schema.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: True when the input fully conforms to the envelope schema.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: Flattened human-readable error messages (empty when valid).

properties.name: structuredErrors
properties.description: Structured error objects with path, keyword, and params (empty when valid).

concepts.name: EnvelopeConformanceOptions
concepts.what: Options for configuring envelope conformance checking.

properties.name: tier
properties.description: The conformance tier to filter checks by.

concepts.name: EnforceComplianceOptions
concepts.what: Options controlling which compliance stages are executed.

properties.name: checkConformance
properties.description: Whether to run envelope conformance checks after schema validation.

properties.name: checkFlags
properties.description: Whether to run flag conformance checks.

properties.name: flags
properties.description: Flag input to validate when `checkFlags` is enabled.

properties.name: requireJsonOutput
properties.description: When true, asserts that the resolved output format is JSON.

concepts.name: ComplianceResult
concepts.what: Aggregated result of a full LAFS compliance run.

properties.name: ok
properties.description: True when every executed stage passes with zero issues.

properties.name: envelope
properties.description: The parsed envelope, present only when schema validation succeeds.

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Schema validation result from AJV.

properties.name: envelopeConformance
properties.description: Envelope conformance report, present when `EnforceComplianceOptions.checkConformance` is true.

properties.name: flagConformance
properties.description: Flag conformance report, present when `EnforceComplianceOptions.checkFlags` is true.

properties.name: issues
properties.description: All issues collected across every executed stage.

concepts.name: DeprecationEntry
concepts.what: A single deprecation rule in the registry.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique identifier for this deprecation rule

properties.name: code
properties.description: Warning code emitted when detected

properties.name: message
properties.description: Human-readable deprecation message

properties.name: deprecated
properties.description: Version where the feature was deprecated

properties.name: replacement
properties.description: Suggested replacement or migration path.

properties.name: removeBy
properties.description: Version where the deprecated feature will be removed

properties.name: detector
properties.description: Predicate that returns `true` when the envelope uses the deprecated feature

concepts.name: ExtensionNegotiationResult
concepts.what: Result of extension negotiation between client and agent

properties.name: requested
properties.description: URIs requested by the client

properties.name: activated
properties.description: URIs that matched agent-declared extensions

properties.name: unsupported
properties.description: Requested URIs not declared by the agent (ignored per spec)

properties.name: missingRequired
properties.description: Agent-required URIs not present in client request

properties.name: activatedByKind
properties.description: Activated extensions grouped by declared kind (when provided)

concepts.name: BuildLafsExtensionOptions
concepts.what: Options for building the LAFS extension declaration

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether the LAFS extension is required for all requests.

properties.name: supportsContextLedger
properties.description: Whether the agent supports context ledger tracking.

properties.name: supportsTokenBudgets
properties.description: Whether the agent supports token budget enforcement.

properties.name: envelopeSchema
properties.description: URL of the JSON Schema for the LAFS envelope.

concepts.name: BuildExtensionOptions
concepts.what: Options for building a generic A2A extension declaration

properties.name: uri
properties.description: Canonical URI identifying the extension

properties.name: description
properties.description: Human-readable description of what the extension provides

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether the extension is required for all requests.

properties.name: kind
properties.description: Classification of the extension's behavior

properties.name: params
properties.description: Additional parameters to include in the extension declaration.

concepts.name: ExtensionNegotiationMiddlewareOptions
concepts.what: Options for the extension negotiation middleware

properties.name: extensions
properties.description: Agent-declared extensions to negotiate against

properties.name: enforceRequired
properties.description: Return 400 if required extensions are missing.

concepts.name: ServiceConfig
concepts.what: Legacy service configuration.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Service name

properties.name: version
properties.description: Service version

properties.name: description
properties.description: Human-readable description.

concepts.name: EndpointConfig
concepts.what: Legacy endpoint configuration.

properties.name: envelope
properties.description: Envelope endpoint URL

properties.name: context
properties.description: Context endpoint URL.

properties.name: discovery
properties.description: Discovery endpoint URL

concepts.name: DiscoveryConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for the discovery middleware (A2A v1.0 format).

properties.name: agent
properties.description: Agent information (required for A2A v1.0; omit only with legacy `service`).

properties.name: baseUrl
properties.description: Base URL for constructing absolute URLs.

properties.name: cacheMaxAge
properties.description: Cache duration in seconds.

properties.name: schemaUrl
properties.description: Schema URL override.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: Optional custom response headers.

properties.name: autoIncludeLafsExtension

type.original: boolean | { required?: boolean; supportsContextLedger?: boolean; supportsTokenBudgets?: boolean; } | undefined

properties.description: Automatically include LAFS as an A2A extension in Agent Card. Pass `true` for defaults, or an object to customize parameters.

properties.name: service
properties.description: Legacy service configuration.

properties.name: capabilities
properties.description: Legacy capabilities list.

properties.name: endpoints

type.original: { envelope: string; context?: string; discovery?: string; } | undefined

properties.description: Legacy endpoint URLs.

properties.name: lafsVersion
properties.description: Legacy LAFS version override.

concepts.name: DiscoveryMiddlewareOptions
concepts.what: Discovery middleware options.

properties.name: path
properties.description: Primary path to serve Agent Card.

properties.name: legacyPath
properties.description: Legacy path for backward compatibility.

properties.name: enableLegacyPath
properties.description: Enable legacy path support.

properties.name: enableHead
properties.description: Enable HEAD requests.

properties.name: enableEtag
properties.description: Enable ETag caching.

concepts.name: ParseLafsResponseOptions
concepts.what: Options for `parseLafsResponse`.

properties.name: requireRegisteredErrorCode
properties.description: When `true`, unregistered error codes cause an additional `Error` to be thrown instead of the normal `LafsError`.

concepts.name: LafsA2AConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for LAFS A2A integration.

properties.name: defaultBudget

type.original: { maxTokens?: number; maxItems?: number; maxBytes?: number; } | undefined

properties.description: Default token budget for all operations.

properties.name: envelopeResponses
properties.description: Whether to automatically wrap responses in LAFS envelopes.

properties.name: protocolVersion
properties.description: A2A protocol version to use.

properties.name: defaultExtensions
properties.description: Extension URIs to activate for all requests.

concepts.name: CreateTaskOptions
concepts.what: Options for creating a new task

properties.name: contextId
properties.description: Context ID for grouping related tasks.

properties.name: metadata
properties.description: Arbitrary metadata to attach to the task.

properties.name: referenceTaskIds
properties.description: IDs of parent tasks this task refines or follows up on.

properties.name: parallelFollowUp
properties.description: Whether this follow-up can run in parallel with its references.

concepts.name: ListTasksOptions
concepts.what: Options for listing tasks

properties.name: contextId
properties.description: Filter tasks by context ID.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Filter tasks by current state.

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

properties.name: pageToken
properties.description: Cursor token for pagination (last seen task ID).

concepts.name: ListTasksResult
concepts.what: Paginated result from listTasks

properties.name: tasks
properties.description: Array of tasks matching the query

properties.name: nextPageToken
properties.description: Token for fetching the next page of results.

concepts.name: TaskStreamEvent
concepts.what: Union type of task stream events emitted by the event bus.

concepts.name: StreamIteratorOptions
concepts.what: Options for the stream task events async iterator

properties.name: timeoutMs
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds before the iterator yields control.

concepts.name: PushNotificationDeliveryResult
concepts.what: Result of delivering a push notification to a single webhook

properties.name: configId
properties.description: Identifier of the config that was dispatched to

properties.name: ok
properties.description: Whether the delivery succeeded

properties.name: status
properties.description: HTTP status code from the webhook response.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Error message if delivery failed.

concepts.name: GrpcStatusCode
concepts.what: Numeric gRPC status code value (0-16)

concepts.name: GrpcStatusName
concepts.what: String name of a gRPC status code (e.g. `"OK"`, `"NOT_FOUND"`)

concepts.name: GrpcStatus
concepts.what: gRPC Status object for A2A errors.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Numeric gRPC status code

properties.name: message
properties.description: Human-readable error message

properties.name: details
properties.description: Structured error details (typically `google.rpc.ErrorInfo` entries).

concepts.name: CircuitState
concepts.what: Represents the three possible states of a circuit breaker.

concepts.name: CircuitBreakerConfig
concepts.what: Configuration options for a `CircuitBreaker` instance.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Unique identifier for this circuit breaker, used in log messages and metrics.

properties.name: failureThreshold
properties.description: Number of failures required to trip the circuit from CLOSED to OPEN.

properties.name: resetTimeout
properties.description: Milliseconds to wait before transitioning from OPEN to HALF_OPEN.

properties.name: halfOpenMaxCalls
properties.description: Maximum number of trial calls allowed while in the HALF_OPEN state.

properties.name: successThreshold
properties.description: Consecutive successes required in HALF_OPEN to close the circuit.

concepts.name: HealthCheckConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for the `healthCheck` middleware.

properties.name: path
properties.description: URL path at which the health endpoint is mounted.

properties.name: checks
properties.description: Array of custom health check functions to run on each request.

concepts.name: HealthCheckResult
concepts.what: Result of an individual health check.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Human-readable name identifying this check.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Outcome status of the check.

properties.name: message
properties.description: Optional descriptive message providing additional detail.

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Execution duration of the check in milliseconds.

concepts.name: HealthStatus
concepts.what: Aggregated health status returned by the health endpoint.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Overall service health derived from individual check results.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the health check was performed.

properties.name: version
properties.description: LAFS package version.

properties.name: uptime
properties.description: Server uptime in seconds since the middleware was initialised.

properties.name: checks
properties.description: Individual check results.

concepts.name: GracefulShutdownConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for the `gracefulShutdown` handler.

properties.name: timeout
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for in-flight requests before forcing exit.

properties.name: signals
properties.description: POSIX signals that trigger a graceful shutdown.

properties.name: onShutdown
properties.description: Callback invoked at the start of shutdown, before the server stops accepting connections.

properties.name: onClose
properties.description: Callback invoked after all connections have closed (or the timeout elapsed).

concepts.name: ShutdownState
concepts.what: Snapshot of the current shutdown state.

properties.name: isShuttingDown
properties.description: Whether a shutdown sequence is currently in progress.

properties.name: activeConnections
properties.description: Number of TCP connections still open.

properties.name: shutdownStartTime
properties.description: Timestamp when the shutdown sequence began.

operations.name: checkBudget
operations.what: Check if an envelope has exceeded its budget without modifying it.

inputs.name: envelope
inputs.description: The LAFS envelope to check

inputs.name: budget
inputs.description: Maximum allowed token count

type.original: Object with `exceeded` flag, `estimated` token count, and `remaining` budget

outputs.description: Object with `exceeded` flag, `estimated` token count, and `remaining` budget

operations.name: validateConformanceProfiles
operations.what: Validates that the conformance profiles are internally consistent and reference only known checks.

inputs.name: availableChecks
inputs.description: The full list of check names implemented by the conformance runner.

type.original: An object with `valid` (true when no errors) and an `errors` array of diagnostic strings.

outputs.description: An object with `valid` (true when no errors) and an `errors` array of diagnostic strings.

operations.name: validateEnvelope
operations.what: Validates an unknown input against the LAFS envelope JSON Schema (Draft-07).

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: The raw value to validate.

type.original: An `EnvelopeValidationResult` with validity status and any errors.

outputs.description: An `EnvelopeValidationResult` with validity status and any errors.

operations.name: runEnvelopeConformance
operations.what: Runs the full suite of LAFS envelope conformance checks.

inputs.name: envelope
inputs.description: The raw value to validate as a LAFS envelope.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Optional tier filter for the conformance checks.

type.original: A `ConformanceReport` with individual check results and an overall pass/fail.

outputs.description: A `ConformanceReport` with individual check results and an overall pass/fail.

operations.name: runFlagConformance
operations.what: Runs LAFS flag-semantics conformance checks against a set of flag inputs.

inputs.name: flags
inputs.description: The flag input to validate.

type.original: A `ConformanceReport` with individual check results and an overall pass/fail.

outputs.description: A `ConformanceReport` with individual check results and an overall pass/fail.

operations.name: enforceCompliance
operations.what: Runs the full LAFS compliance pipeline against an unknown input value.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: The raw value to validate as a LAFS envelope.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Controls which optional stages execute.

type.original: A `ComplianceResult` with the aggregate pass/fail status and per-stage reports.

outputs.description: A `ComplianceResult` with the aggregate pass/fail status and per-stage reports.

operations.name: createComplianceMiddleware
operations.what: Creates a `ComplianceMiddleware` that enforces LAFS compliance on the next handler's output.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Compliance options forwarded to `assertCompliance`.

type.original: A middleware function that validates the downstream envelope.

outputs.description: A middleware function that validates the downstream envelope.

operations.name: buildLafsExtension
operations.what: Build an A2A AgentExtension object declaring LAFS support.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configuration options for the LAFS extension declaration

type.original: A2A AgentExtension object ready for inclusion in an Agent Card

outputs.description: A2A AgentExtension object ready for inclusion in an Agent Card

operations.name: buildExtension
operations.what: Build a generic A2A AgentExtension object.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Configuration for the extension declaration

outputs.description: A2A AgentExtension object

operations.name: validateExtensionDeclaration
operations.what: Validate an A2A extension declaration for correctness.

inputs.name: extension
inputs.description: The AgentExtension to validate

type.original: Object with `valid` boolean and optional `error` message

outputs.description: Object with `valid` boolean and optional `error` message

operations.name: createEnvelope
operations.what: Create a fully validated LAFS envelope from a success or error input.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Discriminated union of success or error input data.

outputs.description: A complete `LAFSEnvelope` ready for serialization.

operations.name: createLafsArtifact
operations.what: Create a LAFS envelope artifact for A2A.

inputs.name: envelope
inputs.description: LAFS envelope to wrap as an artifact

type.original: A2A Artifact containing the envelope as a DataPart

outputs.description: A2A Artifact containing the envelope as a DataPart

operations.name: createTextArtifact
operations.what: Create a text artifact.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Text content for the artifact

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Display name for the artifact

type.original: A2A Artifact containing the text as a TextPart

outputs.description: A2A Artifact containing the text as a TextPart

operations.name: createFileArtifact
operations.what: Create a file artifact.

inputs.name: fileUrl
inputs.description: URI pointing to the file resource

inputs.name: mediaType
inputs.description: MIME type of the file (e.g., `application/pdf`)

inputs.name: filename
inputs.description: Optional display filename for the artifact

type.original: A2A Artifact containing the file reference as a FilePart

outputs.description: A2A Artifact containing the file reference as a FilePart

operations.name: createJsonRpcRequest
operations.what: Create a JSON-RPC 2.0 request object.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Client-assigned request identifier

inputs.name: method
inputs.description: The RPC method name to invoke

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional named parameters for the method call

outputs.description: A fully formed `JsonRpcRequest` object

operations.name: createJsonRpcResponse
operations.what: Create a JSON-RPC 2.0 success response.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Identifier matching the originating request, or `null` for notifications

inputs.name: result
inputs.description: The return value of the invoked method

outputs.description: A fully formed `JsonRpcResponse` object

operations.name: createJsonRpcErrorResponse
operations.what: Create a JSON-RPC 2.0 error response.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Identifier matching the originating request, or `null` for notifications

inputs.name: code
inputs.description: Numeric error code (standard or A2A-specific)

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Short human-readable description of the error

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Optional additional structured error data

outputs.description: A fully formed `JsonRpcErrorResponse` object

operations.name: createA2AErrorResponse
operations.what: Create an A2A-specific JSON-RPC error response by error type name.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Identifier matching the originating request, or `null` for notifications

inputs.name: errorType
inputs.description: The A2A error type name (e.g. `"TaskNotFound"`)

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Short human-readable description of the error

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Optional additional structured error data

type.original: A fully formed `JsonRpcErrorResponse` with the resolved A2A error code

outputs.description: A fully formed `JsonRpcErrorResponse` with the resolved A2A error code

operations.name: validateJsonRpcRequest
operations.what: Validate the structure of a JSON-RPC request.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: The unknown value to validate

type.original: An object with `valid` indicating success and `errors` listing any violations

outputs.description: An object with `valid` indicating success and `errors` listing any violations

operations.name: createGrpcStatus
operations.what: Create a gRPC Status object for an A2A error type.

inputs.name: errorType
inputs.description: The A2A error type name (e.g. `"TaskNotFound"`)

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Human-readable error message

inputs.name: metadata
inputs.description: Optional key-value metadata to include in the ErrorInfo detail

type.original: A fully formed `GrpcStatus` object with ErrorInfo details

outputs.description: A fully formed `GrpcStatus` object with ErrorInfo details

operations.name: createProblemDetails
operations.what: Create an RFC 9457 Problem Details object for an A2A error.

inputs.name: errorType
inputs.description: The A2A error type name (e.g. `"TaskNotFound"`)

inputs.name: detail
inputs.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

inputs.name: extensions
inputs.description: Optional additional members to include in the response

outputs.description: A fully formed `ProblemDetails` object

operations.name: createLafsProblemDetails
operations.what: Create an RFC 9457 Problem Details object bridging A2A error types with LAFS error data.

inputs.name: errorType
inputs.description: The A2A error type name (e.g. `"InvalidAgentResponse"`)

inputs.name: lafsError
inputs.description: The LAFS error object to extract extension fields from

inputs.name: requestId
inputs.description: Optional request identifier used as the `instance` field

type.original: A `ProblemDetails` object with LAFS extension fields

outputs.description: A `ProblemDetails` object with LAFS extension fields

operations.name: buildUrl
operations.what: Build a URL by substituting path parameters.

inputs.name: endpoint
inputs.description: HTTP endpoint definition from `HTTP_ENDPOINTS`

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Path parameter values keyed by name (without leading colon)

type.original: The resolved URL path string with parameters substituted

outputs.description: The resolved URL path string with parameters substituted

operations.name: createDatabaseHealthCheck
operations.what: Create a health check function that verifies database connectivity.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Database check configuration
config.checkConnection - Async function returning `true` if the database is reachable
config.name - Display name for this check in health output

outputs.description: A `HealthCheckFunction` suitable for use in `HealthCheckConfig.checks`

operations.name: createExternalServiceHealthCheck
operations.what: Create a health check function that probes an external HTTP service.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: External service check configuration
config.name - Display name for this check in health output
config.url - URL to probe for health status
config.timeout - Request timeout in milliseconds

outputs.description: A `HealthCheckFunction` suitable for use in `HealthCheckConfig.checks`

operations.name: createAdapterErrorEnvelope
operations.what: Create a LAFS error envelope for MCP adapter errors.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: Human-readable error message

inputs.name: operation
inputs.description: The operation being performed when the error occurred

inputs.name: category
inputs.description: Error category (defaults to `"INTERNAL"`)

type.original: LAFS envelope with `success: false` and the error payload

outputs.description: LAFS envelope with `success: false` and the error payload

constraints.rule: Error When the input does not conform to the envelope schema.
LafsError When the envelope indicates failure (`success=false`).
Error When the envelope is structurally invalid or   `requireRegisteredErrorCode` is `true` and the code is unregistered.
`LAFSFlagError` When format or field layer flags conflict.
Error if the error type is not a known A2A error type

configSchema.description: Characters per token ratio.
Maximum depth to traverse for circular reference detection.
